name: Smoked Sausage and Corn Bread Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds smoked sausage, cut into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the sausage in a 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
2. Combine the vegetables and spoon over the sausage.
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper to taste.
4. Prepare the corn bread mix according to the package directions.
5. Spoon the prepared corn bread over the sausage mixture.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the corn bread is golden brown.
7. Serves 4 to 6.
